name: ITIL AI Agentic Server Patching Workflow

nodes.name: Weekly Patch Cycle Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires every week to initiate the patching cycle. Can also be triggered manually.

nodes.name: MCP: Launch Tenable Vulnerability Scan
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Tenable/Nessus. Triggers authenticated scan against all production CIs.

nodes.name: Wait for Scan Completion
nodes.notes: Wait 5 minutes for Tenable scan to complete before polling results.

nodes.name: MCP: Fetch Vulnerability Results
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Tenable. Retrieves scan results filtered to Critical and High CVEs.

values.content: You are an expert ITIL Change Manager and Security Engineer. Analyze vulnerability scan results and produce a structured risk assessment. For each vulnerability: rate business impact (1-10), urgency (1-10), calculate composite risk score, recommend patch priority (P1/P2/P3), identify affected services, suggest maintenance window. Output strictly as JSON array.

nodes.name: AI Agent: Risk Assessment & Prioritization
nodes.notes: AI analyses CVEs, maps to business services, scores risk and sets P1/P2/P3 priority.

nodes.name: Critical Vulns Found?
nodes.notes: Routes to emergency CAB path if critical CVEs exist, otherwise standard change path.

nodes.name: Slack: Emergency Alert to Security Team
nodes.notes: Native n8n Slack node. Posts emergency alert to #security-alerts channel.

nodes.name: Slack: Standard Patch Notification
nodes.notes: Native n8n Slack node. Notifies #itops-patching for standard change track.

values.content: You are an ITIL Change Manager. Generate a complete, professional RFC (Request for Change) document for server patching. Include all required ITIL fields. Output as structured JSON that can be submitted directly to ServiceNow.

nodes.name: AI Agent: Generate RFC Document
nodes.notes: AI auto-generates a complete ITIL RFC with implementation plan, rollback, and test plan.

nodes.name: ServiceNow: Create Change Request (RFC)
nodes.notes: Native n8n ServiceNow node. Creates the RFC in ServiceNow Change Management module.

nodes.name: Jira: Create Tracking Ticket
nodes.notes: Native n8n Jira node. Creates linked tracking ticket in PATCH project for team visibility.

parameters.name: extra_vars
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ rfc_number: $('ServiceNow: Create Change Request (RFC)').item.json.result.number, patches: JSON.parse($('AI Agent: Risk Assessment & Prioritization').item.json.choices[0].message.content).vulnerabilities.map(v => v.cve_id) }) }}

nodes.name: MCP: Ansible - Apply Patches to Non-Prod
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Ansible AAP. Runs patch playbook against staging/nonprod environment first.

nodes.name: Wait: Non-Prod Patch Run
nodes.notes: Wait 10 minutes for non-prod patching to complete.

nodes.name: MCP: Check Non-Prod Patch Status
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Ansible. Polls job status to confirm non-prod patching succeeded.

nodes.name: Non-Prod Tests Passed?
nodes.notes: Gate: only proceed to CAB approval if non-prod patching succeeded.

nodes.name: Slack: Alert Non-Prod Failure
nodes.notes: Notifies team if non-prod patching fails. Workflow stops here pending investigation.

nodes.name: ServiceNow: Update RFC - Ready for CAB
nodes.notes: Updates RFC state to Scheduled and adds non-prod test evidence to work notes.

nodes.name: Slack: CAB Review Request
nodes.notes: Posts CAB review request to #cab-approvals with RFC link. CAB members approve in ServiceNow.

nodes.name: Wait: CAB Decision (24h / Webhook)
nodes.notes: Waits up to 24h for CAB decision. ServiceNow webhook fires this node when RFC state changes.

nodes.name: ServiceNow: Check CAB Decision
nodes.notes: Fetches RFC state from ServiceNow to determine if CAB approved or rejected.

nodes.name: CAB Approved?
nodes.notes: Routes to production patching if CAB approved, or revision loop if rejected.

nodes.name: Slack: CAB Rejection Notice
nodes.notes: Notifies team of CAB rejection with reason. Workflow ends; manual RFC revision required.

parameters.name: servers
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.parse($('AI Agent: Risk Assessment & Prioritization').item.json.choices[0].message.content).vulnerabilities.map(v => v.server).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i).join(',') }}

nodes.name: MCP: Veeam - Take Pre-Patch Snapshots
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Veeam Backup. Takes snapshots of all target servers before patching begins.

nodes.name: Wait: Snapshot Completion
nodes.notes: Wait 5 minutes for all snapshots to complete.

nodes.name: Slack: Patching Started Notification
nodes.notes: Informs ops team that production patching is commencing.

nodes.name: MCP: PagerDuty - Open Maintenance Window
nodes.notes: MCP Server: PagerDuty. Opens 4-hour maintenance window to suppress alerts during patching.

parameters.name: extra_vars
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ rfc_number: $('ServiceNow: Create Change Request (RFC)').item.json.result.number, patches: JSON.parse($('AI Agent: Risk Assessment & Prioritization').item.json.choices[0].message.content).vulnerabilities.map(v => v.cve_id), snapshot_job_id: $('MCP: Veeam - Take Pre-Patch Snapshots').item.json.job_id }) }}

nodes.name: MCP: Ansible - Apply Patches to Production
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Ansible AAP. Runs production patch playbook with 25% rolling batch updates.

nodes.name: Wait: Production Patching (30 min)
nodes.notes: Wait 30 minutes for production patching across all rolling batches.

nodes.name: MCP: Check Production Patch Status
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Ansible. Polls production job to confirm patch completion.

nodes.name: MCP: Datadog - Check Service Health
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Datadog. Queries all production monitors for alerts within 15 minutes of patching.

parameters.name: targets
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.parse($('AI Agent: Risk Assessment & Prioritization').item.json.choices[0].message.content).vulnerabilities.map(v => v.server).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i).join(',') }}

nodes.name: MCP: Tenable - Post-Patch Verification Scan
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Tenable. Re-scans patched servers against the original CVE list to confirm remediation.

nodes.name: Wait: Verification Scan
nodes.notes: Wait 5 minutes for verification scan to complete.

nodes.name: MCP: Fetch Verification Results
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Tenable. Fetches verification scan results to check if CVEs are remediated.

values.content: You are an ITIL Change Manager doing post-implementation review. Analyze patching results and determine: 1) Did all patches apply successfully? 2) Are original CVEs remediated? 3) Are services healthy per monitoring? 4) Should we close the RFC as successful or initiate rollback? Output JSON with decision.

nodes.name: AI Agent: Post-Implementation Review
nodes.notes: AI synthesises Ansible, Datadog and Tenable data to determine SUCCESS or ROLLBACK decision.

nodes.name: Patch Successful?
nodes.notes: Routes to close/CMDB update on success, or rollback on failure.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.value: =Post-patch testing failed - RFC {{ $('ServiceNow: Create Change Request (RFC)').item.json.result.number }}

nodes.name: MCP: Veeam - Execute Rollback
nodes.notes: MCP Server: Veeam. Initiates instant VM recovery from pre-patch snapshot on failure.

nodes.name: Slack: Rollback Alert
nodes.notes: Emergency alert to #security-alerts when rollback is triggered.

parameters.name: servers
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.parse($('AI Agent: Risk Assessment & Prioritization').item.json.choices[0].message.content).vulnerabilities.map(v => v.server).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i).join(',') }}

nodes.name: MCP: CMDB - Update CI Patch Records
nodes.notes: MCP Server: ServiceNow CMDB. Updates all CI records with patch date, status and CVE count.

nodes.name: ServiceNow: Close Change Record
nodes.notes: Native n8n ServiceNow node. Closes the RFC with full PIR notes and outcome summary.

nodes.name: Jira: Close Tracking Ticket
nodes.notes: Native n8n Jira node. Closes the PATCH project tracking issue.

nodes.name: MCP: PagerDuty - Close Maintenance Window
nodes.notes: MCP Server: PagerDuty. Closes maintenance window to re-enable alerting.

nodes.name: Slack: Patch Cycle Complete
nodes.notes: Final success notification with full patch cycle summary.

main.node: Slack: Emergency Alert to Security Team
MCP: Ansible - Apply Patches to Non-Prod
MCP: Ansible - Apply Patches to Production
MCP: CMDB - Update CI Patch Records
